title: Tender Croatian Pork Paella
description: A garlicky and flavorful Croatian dish featuring pork, applesauce, and papillote, perfect for a crowd, this recipe is also diabetic friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium high heat.
Add the pork to the paella pan and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the smoked sausage to the paella pan and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper to the paella pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth, saffron, and applesauce to the paella pan and stir to combine.
Cover the paella pan with foil and transfer to the preheated oven.
Bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the paella pan from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
